name: cursor-agent-music
description: Play music while the Cursor agent is working and stop when it finishes.

cursorAgentMusic.enabled.description: Enable automatic music playback when the Cursor agent is active.

cursorAgentMusic.musicSource.description: Absolute path to an audio file or directory of audio files. Leave blank to use the bundled default tracks.

cursorAgentMusic.volume.description: Playback volume passed to macOS afplay.

cursorAgentMusic.shuffle.description: Shuffle tracks when musicSource points to a directory.

cursorAgentMusic.fadeOutMs.description: Best-effort stop delay before playback is terminated. macOS afplay does not support native fades, so this is not a true volume fade.

cursorAgentMusic.stateFilePath.description: Absolute path override for the shared Cursor Agent Music state file. Leave blank to use ~/.cursor/cursor-agent-music/agent-music-state.json.
